titles.title: God will take care of you

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: 1. Be not dismayed whate’er betide, God will take care of you; Beneath his wings of love abide, God will take care of you.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Refrain: God will take care of you, Through ev'ry day, O’er all the way; He will take care of you, God will take care of you.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: 2. Through days of toil when heart does fail, God will take care of you; When dangers fierce your path assail, God will take care of you.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: 3. All you may need he will provide, God will take care of you; Nothing you ask will be denied, God will take care of you.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: 4. No matter what may be the test, God will take care of you; Lean, weary one, upon his breast, God will take care of you.
